name: Wicked Executive Unkaind (Yo-Kai Watch)
description:
Requested By: @Sillybilly12232

Congratulations on acquiring the Yo-Kai Watch!

Good News: With the watch, you can now perceive the supernatural. Your life is about to become far more exciting and will never be the same!

Bad News: The ability to see the supernatural—while exciting—also means your life will never be the same. Furthermore, when you tell people about these so-called "Yo-Kai," they will inevitably think you're insane.

In any case, you've recently been hearing persistent rumors about an evil presence inexplicably lurking on the first floor north side of the local elementary school. Assuming it was another Yo-Kai causing trouble, you decided to investigate the elementary school after dark.
creator: KMaster_Controller
